info.title: Tsuga Public API
info.description: Public HTTP API for Tsuga customers and customer-operated tools. Use these endpoints to query observability data, manage customer-owned Tsuga resources, and retrieve documentation or API-reference content. Public API requests authenticate with Bearer tokens such as operation keys. See [API reference](/documentation/api).

bearerAuth.description: Send `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Public API clients use operation keys or OAuth access tokens; browser and internal routes may use user JWTs where configured.

requestId.description: Identifier used to trace the lifecycle of this API request

kind.description: `doc` for documentation pages (guides, references, release notes); `api` for API-reference endpoints indexed from the OpenAPI spec. Use this to decide how to present or follow up on the result.

path.description: Path identifying the result. Documentation pages use a slug path (e.g. `data-collection/guides/how-to-add-resource-attributes`). API-reference results use `api/<operationId>` (e.g. `api/aggregateScalar`).

title.description: Title of the result (e.g. "How to Add Resource Attributes" or "POST /v1/aggregation/multi-query/scalar")

subsection.description: For documentation pages: the heading path inside the page that matched (e.g. "Language setup"). For API results: the matched field or parameter breadcrumb (e.g. "Body › queries"). Absent when the match is the page or endpoint intro.

tab.description: Tab label inside the page that the result matched. Set when the matching content is inside a <Tabs><Tab label="…"> block. Always absent for API results.

anchor.description: For documentation pages: the slugified heading ID used as the URL fragment (e.g. `language-setup`). For API results: the Scalar deep-link fragment (`tag/<tag>/<METHOD><path>`). The `link` field already has this baked in.

score.description: Relevance score between 0 and 1 (higher is more relevant)

link.description: URL to the result in the Tsuga app. Documentation pages include the section anchor and tab query parameter when applicable. API results deep-link into the API reference at `/documentation/api#tag/…`.

DocSearchResult.description: A documentation page or API-reference endpoint search result

post.description: Creates a tag policy for Tsuga-managed assets or telemetry data. Use the configuration type to choose the policy surface.

name.description: Human-readable tag policy name.

isActive.description: Set to true for Tsuga to evaluate this policy.

tagKey.description: Tag key enforced by this policy.

allowedTagValues.description: Allowed values for `tagKey`. Leave empty to allow any value when the tag exists.

isRequired.description: Set to true to require the tag. If false, allowed values still apply when the tag exists.

teamIds.description: Team IDs used by this policy scope.

mode.description: `include` applies the policy only to listed teams. `exclude` applies it to all teams except the listed teams.

type.description: Policy applies to telemetry data points during ingestion or evaluation.

items.description: Telemetry signal covered by a data tag policy.

assetTypes.description: Telemetry signals covered by the policy. An empty array means logs, metrics, and traces.

shouldInsertWarning.description: When true, Tsuga annotates non-compliant telemetry with tag policy warnings instead of only measuring violations.

dropSample.description: Percentage of non-compliant telemetry datapoints to drop. Valid values are 0 through 100.

type.description: Policy applies to Tsuga-managed resources such as dashboards, routes, and keys.

items.description: Tsuga-managed asset type covered by an asset tag policy.

assetTypes.description: Tsuga-managed asset types covered by the policy. An empty array means all supported asset types.

owner.description: Team ID that will own and manage the policy.

tags.name: aggregation
tags.description: Operations for aggregating logs, metrics, and traces. Use these endpoints to compute scalar and timeseries results for analytics workflows. See [Analytics queries](/documentation/visualize/analytics/queries).

tags.name: clusters
tags.description: Operations for listing Tsuga clusters that hold observability data. Use these endpoints to choose cluster scope for telemetry queries. See [Clusters](/documentation/account-and-settings/clusters).

tags.name: custom-usage-tags
tags.description: Operations for custom telemetry tag keys tracked as usage dimensions. Use these endpoints to configure which tags appear in usage analysis. See [Usage overview](/documentation/account-and-settings/usage-overview).

tags.name: dashboards
tags.description: Operations for saved dashboards and dashboard graphs. Use these endpoints to inventory, create, update, and delete reusable visualization definitions. See [Dashboards](/documentation/visualize/dashboards/index).

tags.name: docs
tags.description: Operations for retrieving and searching Tsuga documentation and API-reference content. Use these endpoints to power in-product help and documentation search. See [Documentation](/documentation).

tags.name: ingestion-api-keys
tags.description: Operations for telemetry ingestion keys. Use these endpoints to create, inspect, update, and delete keys used by collectors and direct telemetry senders. See [API keys](/documentation/account-and-settings/api-keys).

tags.name: inventory
tags.description: Operations for cloud inventory resources. Use these endpoints to list resources discovered from connected cloud accounts. See [Cloud resources](/documentation/categorize/cloud-resources).

tags.name: invitations
tags.description: Operations for organization invitations. Use these endpoints to invite users and inspect invitation lifecycle state. See [How to invite members](/documentation/account-and-settings/guides/how-to-invite-members).

tags.name: logs
tags.description: Operations for searching log events, inspecting log attributes, and analyzing recurring log patterns. See [Logs](/documentation/explore/logs).

tags.name: metrics
tags.description: Operations for discovering metric names, retrieving metric metadata, and querying metric data across telemetry sources. See [Metrics](/documentation/explore/metrics/index).

tags.name: monitors
tags.description: Operations for saved monitor definitions. Use these endpoints to create, inspect, update, and delete alert evaluation rules, not notification delivery. See [Monitors](/documentation/alert/monitors/index).

tags.name: notification-rules
tags.description: Operations for notification routing rules. Use these endpoints to match alert transitions and send notifications to configured targets. See [Rules](/documentation/alert/notifications/rules).

tags.name: notification-silences
tags.description: Operations for notification silences. Use these endpoints to suppress matching notification delivery during one-time or recurring windows. See [Silences](/documentation/alert/notifications/silences).

tags.name: organization
tags.description: Operations for organization-level settings. Use these endpoints to inspect or update account-wide configuration such as allowed email domains. See [Domains and email login](/documentation/account-and-settings/authentication/domains-and-email-login).

tags.name: promql
tags.description: Operations for PromQL-compatible metric queries. Use these endpoints when a client needs PromQL query syntax against Tsuga metric data.

tags.name: quality-reports
tags.description: Operations for telemetry quality report rows. Use these endpoints to inspect rule outcomes and recommendations for teams or clusters. See [Quality reports](/documentation/account-and-settings/quality-reports).

tags.name: dashboard-folders
tags.description: Folders for organizing dashboards into a two-level hierarchy.

tags.name: retention-policies
tags.description: Operations for retention policy rows for logs, metrics, and traces. Use these endpoints to inspect or manage signal retention by scope. See [Retention](/documentation/account-and-settings/retention).

tags.name: routes
tags.description: Operations for log routes and route processors. Use these endpoints to manage ingest-time log processing definitions. See [Routes](/documentation/process/routes/index).

tags.name: services
tags.description: Operations for services inferred from telemetry. Use these endpoints to inspect service metadata, activity, and dependency graphs. See [Services](/documentation/categorize/services/index).

tags.name: tag-policies
tags.description: Operations for tag policies applied to Tsuga-managed assets or telemetry data. Use these endpoints to configure required tags and allowed values. See [Tag policies](/documentation/account-and-settings/tag-policies).

tags.name: teams
tags.description: Operations for creating and managing teams used for ownership, collaboration, and access control. See [Teams](/documentation/account-and-settings/teams).

tags.name: team-memberships
tags.description: Operations for team membership assignments. Use these endpoints to add, remove, and update users' roles in teams. See [Members](/documentation/account-and-settings/members).

tags.name: traces
tags.description: Operations for searching distributed traces and inspecting trace spans across services. See [Traces](/documentation/explore/traces).

tags.name: users
tags.description: Operations for organization users. Use these endpoints to list users and resolve user IDs, roles, and display metadata. See [Members](/documentation/account-and-settings/members).
